title: Kansai Nerolac is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kansai Nerolac is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!
